item.title: [EN] - HackTheBox - Omni
item.description: Introduction OS | Difficulty | Release | IP ----------------------------------------------------------------- Other | Easy | 22 Aug 2020 | 10.10.10.204 Writeup available after machine retired

item.title: [EN] - HackTheBox - Ready
item.description: Introduction OS | Difficulty | Release | IP ----------------------------------------------------------------- Linux | Medium | 12 Dec 2020 | 10.10.10.220 Writeup available after machine retired

item.title: [EN] - HackTheBox - OpenKeyS
item.description: Introduction OpenKeys is a OpenBSD Box, created by polarbearer & GibParadox. Initial foothold was Bypassing Authentication by using a CVE-2019-19521. which get us user private key. Privilege Escalation as also related to CVE. OS | Difficulty | Release | IP ----------------------------------------------------------------- OpenBSD | Medium | 25 Jul 2020 | 10.10.10.199 1. Reconnaissance First thing, add the IP address to /etc/hosts and the host name is openkeys.htb echo "10.10.10.199 openkeys.htb" >> /etc/hosts 1.

item.title: About
item.description: Kamal Elsayed aka kamalinux, 23 years old | Cybersecurity Engineer - Pentester - Red/Blue Team Enthusiast. Bugcrowd profile : https://bugcrowd.com/kamalinux TryHackMe profile : https://tryhackme.com/p/kamalinux HackTheBox profile : https://www.hackthebox.eu/profile/76037 See more on LinkedIn.
